creator: contact@toha.org.ua
text:
new port:

	eXist is an Open Source native XML database featuring efficient,
	index-based XQuery processing, automatic indexing, extensions for
	full-text search, XUpdate support, XQuery update extensions and tight
	integration with existing XML development tools. The database
	implements the current XQuery 1.0 working drafts, with exception of the
	schema import and schema validation features defined as optional in
	the XQuery specification.

Fix: shar:
